# services.plausible

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.plausible`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.plausible.database.clickhouse.setup` | `boolean` | Whether to enable creating a clickhouse instance. |
| `services.plausible.database.clickhouse.url` | `string` | The URL to be used to connect to `clickhouse`. |
| `services.plausible.database.postgres.dbname` | `string` | Name of the database to use. |
| `services.plausible.database.postgres.setup` | `boolean` | Whether to enable creating a postgresql instance. |
| `services.plausible.database.postgres.socket` | `string` | Path to the UNIX domain-socket to communicate with `postgres`. |
| `services.plausible.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable plausible. |
| `services.plausible.mail.email` | `string` | The email id to use for as *from* address of all communications from Plausible. |
| `services.plausible.mail.smtp.enableSSL` | `boolean` | Whether to enable SSL when connecting to the SMTP server. |
| `services.plausible.mail.smtp.hostAddr` | `string` | The host address of your smtp server. |
| `services.plausible.mail.smtp.hostPort` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The port of your smtp server. |
| `services.plausible.mail.smtp.passwordFile` | `null or string or absolute path` | The path to the file with the password in case SMTP auth is enabled. |
| `services.plausible.mail.smtp.retries` | `unsigned integer, meaning >=0` | Number of retries to make until mailer gives up. |
| `services.plausible.mail.smtp.user` | `null or string` | The username/email in case SMTP auth is enabled. |
| `services.plausible.package` | `package` | The plausible package to use. |
| `services.plausible.server.baseUrl` | `string` | Public URL where plausible is available. Note that `/path` components are currently ignored: <https://github.com/plausible/analytics/issues/1182>. |
| `services.plausible.server.disableRegistration` | `one of true, false, "invite_only"` | Whether to prohibit creating an account in plausible's UI or allow on `invite_only`. |
| `services.plausible.server.listenAddress` | `string` | The IP address on which the server is listening. |
| `services.plausible.server.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port where the service should be available. |
| `services.plausible.server.secretKeybaseFile` | `absolute path or string` | Path to the secret used by the `phoenix`-framework. Instructions how to generate one are documented in the [framework docs](https://hexdocs.pm/phoenix/Mix.Tasks.Phx.Gen.Secret.html#content). |
